segments.text: The
screen lights up and I see your name
Midnight turns into a little flame
I start typing, then I erase
Like I'm standing right in front of your face
Is it still me that makes you smile?
When my name shows up after a while
Is it still me that makes you pause
Before you answer just because
Is it still me in your quiet room
When the night gets sweet and the lights go blue
Is it still me that makes you sweat?
Is it still me you almost say when
you miss the hands that are far away
Is it still me in your future plans when
you close your eyes and reach for my hands
Still smiling when your name appears
Still pausing like you're standing here
Still thinking of you when the lights go blue
Still feeling the heat from across the room
You send questions like little sparks
Landing soft in the dark
Got rhythm once then twice again
Like every word knows where I've been
Yes, it's still you that makes me smile
Even from a thousand miles
Yes, it's still you that makes me wait
Just to feel my heart beat change
Yes, it's still you that makes me wait
It's still you when the lights go low
And I miss the voice I already know
Yes, it's still you that makes me sweat
Yes, it's still you I want beside me
Not just call and not just type
And yes, it's still you in the life I see
But now I have some questions for me
Is it still me?
Is it still you?
In the late night glow when the screen turns blue
Is it still us?
Do we still feel true?
With the whole wide world in between us two
Is it still me?
Is it still you?
When the bass rolls off and the moon comes through
Send me your heart, I'll send mine too
Is it still me, baby?
Is it still you?
Is it still you?
Is it still me?
Is it still me that makes you dream
When you're tired of every little thing
Is it still me?
You wanna call
When your big plans start to feel too tall
Is it still me you're building for
When you save a little more and more
Is it still me you wanna hold
When New York nights get loud and cold
Is it still me that slows your mind
Is it still me that slows your mind
Is it still the time
Is it still me you're coming home to
When the miles finally let us through
Still dreaming when the world gets heavy
Still calling when my plans get messy
Still building, still saving, still choosing you
Still hearing your voice when the night turns blue
Yes, it's still you when I lose my way
You're the calm and the noise of the day
Yes, it's still you when I count what's left
Trying to become my very best
Yes, it's still you when the city screams
Still you in the center of all my dreams
Yes, it's still you that I'm running to
Every changed habit is a road to you
Then don't just say it
I'll prove it slow
Don't just promise
Watch me grow
Don't just miss me
I'll make it real
Then tell me again
You know how I feel
Is it still me, is it still you
In the late night glow when the screen turns blue
Is it still us, do we still feel true
With a whole wide world in between us two
Is it still me, is it still you
When the bass rolls soft and the moon comes through
Send me your heart, I'll send my heart
One, two
Is it still me
Baby
It's still you
Still me
Still you
Still us
Still us
